summary: No route family has enough evidence for promotion yet. Keep held routes out of the public index until checker and next-step demand produces repeat signals.
heldRecommendations: District overlays remain support-only until district-specific demand proves they add decision value.
Corrected-certification and unsafe-condition routes remain held until real support patterns repeat.
Exempt-building support is now backed by official sources, but it should stay noindex until actual challenge demand repeats.
